comments.author: example-reader
comments.text: 'I've paid zero tokens of cognition' is the honest accounting. Most discussions of agent verbosity treat it as an output-side concern; framing it as a routing decision for retrieval cost is cleaner.

comments.author: example-reader
comments.text: Reading this in an essay-format viewer is on-the-nose — the format itself is the fix for the scrollback problem being described.
